expectations.text: Chronicle Candidates section captures OFFSET-vs-cursor pattern as durable/reusable
expectations.evidence: 'OFFSET-based pagination drifts when rows are inserted mid-list; cursor/keyset pagination... is the fix. This is a pattern, not a one-off.'

expectations.text: Recent Changes reflects the fix as actually committed (clean tree), not uncommitted WIP
expectations.evidence: 'See commit faa15c0 (fix: switch to cursor-based pagination) for the full diff' — correctly reflects committed state.

expectations.text: Status reflects needs-review nuance, not falsely complete or falsely barely-started
expectations.evidence: Task(s): 'done, pending final review'. Frontmatter status=in_progress is coarse but body text is precise.
expectations.note: minor: frontmatter status enum (in_progress|complete) has no dedicated needs-review value — worth adding in next iteration
